notes: Approved immutable candidate. Candidate archive SHA-256, content SHA-256, and all 157 manifest file identities match; public-content audit reports zero findings and a clean fresh checkout. The Build Data Candidate workflow keeps exact artifact-ID selection, sets merge-multiple: true so the v4 download action extracts ID-selected artifacts into the requested bundle root, verifies bundle-manifest.json and source-bundle.lock.json before consumption, and passes that same root to automation.compute.cli prepare. Workflow YAML parsing, repository-module checkout ordering, Python compileall and imports, public isolation scanning, and all 31 GitHub Action pipeline contract tests passed.
